strategy: He has only 840 health. If you can, burst him down before the second Round, before he spawns his minions.
Hit with Storm; he only lightly resists Myth (40%) and takes a small Storm boost.
If the Edacious Ogre and Rude Goblin appear, they chain Dragonblades down the line each Round and end with a Tempest for up to 320 Storm. Kill the minions to break the chain.
Open with a blade, then AoE on Round 2 to clear Barbarous and both summons together.
cheatNotes: He summons the Edacious Ogre and Rude Goblin on Round 2. Kill him before then and they never appear.
While any minions are alive, each creature passes a Dragonblade left down the line and the last one casts Tempest for up to 320 Storm. Clearing the minions stops it.
